feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: J4D- S4H- RAP Code Generation - Service Interrupted
entry.content:
Hi Team,

While performing a demo on the RAP Code generation feature in J4D – S4H system, we got the Service Interrupted error after attempting multiple times. Also, kindly let us know how to view logs. 

Attached the screenshot for reference.

Regards,

Sahana

entry.title: new field to post goods receipt fiori tile
entry.content:
Hello,

there is a requirement got to me, to Add a total item amount field in "POST GOODS RECEIPT for purchasing Documents " in the fiori. The total amount should only display for the selected items.

Since i am new to Fiori can i get some help to implement this.

regards, 

krishna

entry.title: adding a ew field in post goods receipt page in fiori
entry.content:
hello,

I have a requirement with me to add a field called total item amount in the post good receipt for purchase documents page in fiori. The catch is the total amount should be only for seletced number of items.

Since i am new to fiori , can anyone help me on implementation of this req.

regards,

krishna

entry.title: error sap note 3694434
entry.content:
Hello,

I am applying SAP Note 3694434 and ran into an error in function module J_1B_NF_IV_MATKL_DETERMINE. The note creates a line that uses the NF_TYPES structure, but this structure is not declared in the function.

I have already opened an incident with SAP, but they were not able to help me.

Has anyone who has already applied this note, or who has a more up-to-date system, been able to check where this structure is declared?

entry.title: Is it possible to expose Custom Fields made from CFL in BAPE_VBAK and BAPE_VBAKX?
entry.content:
I have custom fields for VBAK and VBAP made in CFL. However, it is not shown in BAPE_VBAK/VBAP, therefore, I cannot update its fields using BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE.

Is there a way to expose it without using APPEND?

entry.title: QCM Tables in S4HANA
entry.content:
It has been recommended as per the TPO report by SAP to remove the QCM tables

QCMYYSD0022

QCM/SAPLOM/MEH_

QCMYYLE0035

QCMYYLE0018

QCMYYSD0134

Can we remove these tables directly or we need to check any dependency.

How can we check if there is any dependency to be checked before removing this table.

entry.title: We need to identify all unused custom programs(Z*) in the system that did not run from last 2 years
entry.content: We need to identify all unused custom programs(Z*) in the system that did not run from last 2 years, please advise if that is possible , is any eay to get this?

entry.title: (deleted) Note 933420 is incorrect about ALSM_EXCEL_TO_INTERNAL_TABLE limitations
entry.content:
(deleted)

(in fact, this question is moved to the ABAP forum here: Note 933420 is incorrect about ALSM_EXCEL_TO_INTER... - SAP Community)

entry.title: Which Idoc or RFC/ BADI / EXIT triggered to EWM while doing partial usage decision in S4
entry.content:
Is there any IDOC / RFC which will be triggered to decentralized EWM on completing the usage decision in S4? Any way for partial UD system is opening decentralized EWM from QA32 of S4. But for Final UD S4 will trigger a Idoc to EWM to collect the HU, batch and post it to Unrestricted right. or am I wrong - How to find it?

On clicking EWM inspection its opening EWM and after saving the partial UD at HU level system closing the EWM and throwing this message at the bottom in ERP S4. Which EXIT/BADI triggered during this stage.

entry.title: How do I properly insert custom code in Enhancement-point XXX SPOTS ES_SAPFv45P?
entry.content: I am trying to implement a custom code here. Is Implicit enhancement the only way?

entry.title: Newly generated RAP artifacts not working [BTP-Trial]
entry.content:
I have always created new RAP applications in BTP Trial from a database table using the "Generate ABAP Repository Objects..." feature. However, in the past few days, after generating the application, I am no longer able to preview it. The error "Could not open app. Please try again later." appears every time I try to run it. Am I missing something? The metadata extension and behavior definitions are ok as far as I know.

@EndUserText.label : 'Users Table'
@AbapCatalog.enhancement.category : #NOT_EXTENSIBLE
@AbapCatalog.tableCategory : #TRANSPARENT
@AbapCatalog.deliveryClass : #A
@AbapCatalog.dataMaintenance : #RESTRICTED
define table zjp_users {

  key mandt             : abap.clnt not null;
  key userid            : sysuuid_x16 not null;
  username              : abap.char(20);
  role                  : abap.char(20);
  created_by            : abp_creation_user;
  created_at            : abp_creation_tstmpl;
  local_last_changed_by : abp_locinst_lastchange_user;
  local_last_change_at  : abp_locinst_lastchange_tstmpl;
  last_changed_by       : abp_lastchange_user;
  last_changed_at       : abp_lastchange_tstmpl;

}

entry.title: Restricting Posing Date in MB51 Report
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

The requirement is to restrict the posting date in the MB51 report to a maximum of one month. If the selected BUDAT date range is greater than one month, an error message should be displayed. How to achieve this requirement.

 

Advance Thanks

entry.title: Creating Production Order Component Line Items via API
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

We are currently working on a Custom Application Developed using the RAP (RESTful ABAP Programming) model in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, where Batch wise line items are being managed.

As part of our requirement, we are using the A_ProductionOrderComponent_4 API to update values in the CO02 Production Order screen. However, this API does not fully meet our needs.

At present, when using the PATCH method, we are only able to modify existing line items and are unable to create new ones.

Our requirement is to create new line items in the Production Order Component along with the corresponding batch details. We would like to understand if there is any POST method or appropriate API available to support this functionality. Alternatively, we would appreciate any recommendations for a suitable approach to achieve this requirement.

Thank you,

Production order Component line Item

entry.title: How to Create Custom DRF Outbound Implementation for Table T880 in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on Data Replication Framework (DRF) in SAP S/4HANA and have a requirement to replicate data from table T880 (Company master data) to an external system.

As per my understanding, T880 is not available as a standard DRF-supported business object.

I would like to understand the correct approach for this scenario:

  1. How can we define a custom DRF business object for table T880?

  2. What are the steps to create a custom outbound implementation (Z*)?

  3. How to implement and link the outbound ABAP class with DRF?

  4. How is replication triggered for such custom objects (change pointers or manual DRFOUT)?

  5. In real projects, is DRF recommended for configuration tables like T880, or is a custom interface a better approach?

Any guidance, documentation, or sample implementation would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Sales area info not updaing after adding custom tab on Business Partner
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have added a custom tab to the Business Partner (BP) transaction in S/4HANA.

I created the tab using the BDT (BUS* transactions) and a Z function group with a custom subscreen containing a table control.

Everything works except for one issue:

My problem is that, when I navigate to my custom tab the standard Sales Area fields in the BP header stop updating correctly (visually).

Here the different scenarios:


1- When I visualize a client starting on some standard tab everything is OK and I can change the sales area.

2- If I go now to my custom tab 'GrypoVend - Marca' the sales area information remains OK. But when I try to change it to another sales org:
Text belonging to the fields change but not the codes.

3- When BP starts directly on my custom tab this Sales area information is empty so I choose one. When I do it so, happens de same as before:
No codes but it does update the description

I want to update the codes too so it all have sense and its correct for the user who sees it. When I debug I get through 
 cvi_bdt_adapter=>get_current_bp_sales_data(
   EXPORTING
   i_table_name = 'KNVV'
   IMPORTING
   e_data_table = gt_knvv[]
   ).

the correct sales area information, but I still want to show it on BP.

Can anyone help me with it or give an explanation/solution?

Regards.

entry.title: How to handle a POST call in RAP using custom entity
entry.content:
I have a requirement where I will receive a payload from an external system and create a notification in SAP.
 
The source payload fields are custom fields. Using these  fields, I need to derive all the required data to create the notification in SAP. This also includes implementing necessary validations and error handling.
 
What would be the best approach to handle this scenario in RAP? Should we create a custom entity, an abstract entity, or is there a better recommended approach?
 
In general, we could also create a service in SEGW and handle everything there. However, the goal is to implement this using RAP to stay compliant with a cloud-ready solution.
 
Thanks in advance 🙂
 
ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model  ABAP Development  OData

entry.title: How to send sap ABAP audit log data to Splunk?
entry.content:
I am looking for some documentation or any samples/examples on how to send HTTP requests to Splunk HEC from ABAP audit log

I am looking for best way to send an event from ABAP to Splunk?

entry.title: How to Configure Remote ATC Between SAP BTP ABAP Environment and On‑Premise S/4HANA (Step‑by‑Step)
entry.content:
Cloud Connector RFC Mapping – Not Sure Which Settings to Use

When adding an on‑premise ABAP system in Cloud Connector (Protocol = RFC), I am asked to choose:

  • With load balancing (SID + message server)
  • Without load balancing (app server + instance number)

I am unsure which one is correct for Remote ATC, and what the exact host/port values should be.

Communication System in BTP ABAP Does Not Show RFC Option

After setting up the Cloud Connector entries, when I create a Communication System in the BTP ABAP Environment, the RFC outbound service is missing, and I cannot create the RFC destination required for Remote ATC.

Object Providers Do Not Appear in Custom Code Migration App

In the Custom Code Analysis Project setup screen,
“Object Provider to Remote System” shows No data available, meaning I cannot continue the Remote ATC configuration.

What Is the Correct End‑to‑End Setup?

I am following SAP’s Remote ATC documentation (Cloud Connector + Communication System + Object Provider), but there seems to be missing prerequisites or configuration steps.

Can someone guide me with the correct end‑to‑end steps?

Specifically:

  • Which RFC configuration should be used in Cloud Connector (load balancing or not)?
  • What are the correct message server / app server details for S/4HANA?
  • How to ensure the Communication System in BTP ABAP recognizes the RFC connection?
  • How to make Object Providers appear under ATC Administration → Setup?

Any screenshots, step-by-step instructions, or clarifications from someone who has successfully configured Remote ATC would be greatly appreciated.

I tried to follow few SAP blogs but they are very old to follow up.

Thank you!

entry.title: Enhancing Custom PS Report: Handling 1:N Relationship between WBS Element and Sales Orders (VBAP)
entry.content:
Hello
I am working on an enhancement for a custom Project System report (similar to a project overview/status report).

Current Situation: The report currently displays project details based on a WBS Element. However, the logic for fetching associated Sales Orders is currently limited to a 1:1 relationship. 

The Requirement: Our Project Managers often have multiple Sales Orders assigned to a single WBS element (e.g., one for services, one for materials, and one for an add-on).

  • Example Data in VBAP:

    • WBS: P.*******.1.3 -> SO: 113984

    • WBS: P.*******.1.3 -> SO: 113989

    • WBS: P.*******.1.3 -> SO: 113992

Currently, the report only reflects the first Sales Order. The goal is to update the report logic to display all associated Sales Orders for that single WBS number to provide a comprehensive revenue view.

Technical Questions:

  1. What is the best practice for displaying these multiple rows in an ALV-based report? Should I duplicate the WBS line for each SO, or use a "merged cells" approach in the layout?

  2. Are there any specific performance considerations when fetching all items from Table: VBAP for a large list of WBS elements?

  3. Besides VBAP , is there a more efficient standard SAP view or secondary index I should consider to find Sales Orders linked to a WBS?

Environment: SAP S/4HANA 

Any advice on the logic flow or standard Function Modules that handle this PS-SD link would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: How to Configure Remote ATC Between SAP BTP ABAP Environment and On‑Premise S/4HANA (Step‑by‑Step)?
entry.content:
* Main issue is that I am not able to  find " Object provider for remote system" under custom code analysis tile.

Cloud Connector RFC Mapping – Not Sure Which Settings to Use

When adding an on‑premise ABAP system in Cloud Connector (Protocol = RFC), I am asked to choose:

  • With load balancing (SID + message server)
  • Without load balancing (app server + instance number)

I am unsure which one is correct for Remote ATC, and what the exact host/port values should be.

Communication System in BTP ABAP Does Not Show RFC Option

After setting up the Cloud Connector entries, when I create a Communication System in the BTP ABAP Environment, the RFC outbound service is missing, and I cannot create the RFC destination required for Remote ATC.

Object Providers Do Not Appear in Custom Code Migration App

In the Custom Code Analysis Project setup screen,
“Object Provider to Remote System” shows No data available, meaning I cannot continue the Remote ATC configuration.

What Is the Correct End‑to‑End Setup?

I am following SAP’s Remote ATC documentation (Cloud Connector + Communication System + Object Provider), but there seems to be missing prerequisites or configuration steps.

Can someone guide me with the correct end‑to‑end steps?

Specifically:

  • Which RFC configuration should be used in Cloud Connector (load balancing or not)?
  • What are the correct message server / app server details for S/4HANA?
  • How to ensure the Communication System in BTP ABAP recognizes the RFC connection?
  • How to make Object Providers appear under ATC Administration → Setup?

Any screenshots, step-by-step instructions, or clarifications from someone who has successfully configured Remote ATC would be greatly appreciated.

I tried to follow few SAP blogs but they are very old to follow up.

Thank you!

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

I must admit that I’m feeling quite stuck custom code analysis catalog inside Analyze custom code analysis tile , as I can’t find any proper end‑to‑end documentation. The SAP Help Portal only provides fragmented information, and none of the pages explain the full process in a clear, sequential way. Could you please share any link or document where all the steps are described in order? Main blocker is when I go inside the catalog Custom Code Analysis -> Custom code analysis tile -> Create custom code analysis project "Object provider to remote system" is blank.How to get it.
